summary: All 3 new features VERIFIED: (1) Tutorial mode with RPS diagram and phoneme practice working perfectly, (2) Longer battle turns (6s listen, 5s result) confirmed, (3) Redesigned HP bars with segments, shake animation, and color changes working correctly. Full Tutorial flow tested: Bootâ†’Modeâ†’Tutorialâ†’Rulesâ†’Oracleâ†’Calibrationâ†’TutorialScreenâ†’Practice(3 phonemes)â†’BeginBattleâ†’BATTLE_LOOPâ†’END_GAME. No critical JS errors except expected mic NotFoundError in headless.

issues: Pre-existing: Low contrast text - SELECT MODE label uses rgba(255,255,255,0.35)

critical_code_review_comments: TutorialScreen.js: Well-structured with proper data-testids (tutorial-screen, tutorial-skip, rps-diagram, tutorial-start-practice, tutorial-practice-{burst|flow|tone}, tutorial-begin-battle)
BattleHUD.js: Excellent redesign - segmented bars (10 segments), shake animation via CSS keyframes (hud-shake), color logic (green>50%, yellow 25-50%, red<25%)
gameMachine.js: tutorialMode flag properly routes CALIBRATIONâ†’TUTORIAL state for tutorial mode, CALIBRATIONâ†’BATTLE_LOOP for solo mode
App.js: LISTEN_WINDOW_MS=6000 confirmed, RESULT_DISPLAY after delay 5000ms confirmed in gameMachine
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features fully working. Tutorial flow: Bootâ†’clickâ†’DiegeticInstallâ†’TUTORIAL buttonâ†’9s rulesâ†’oracle-selectâ†’click MENTORâ†’5s confirmingâ†’30s calibration (3 phases)â†’TUTORIAL screenâ†’PRACTICE SOUNDSâ†’3 phoneme practices (3s+0.8s each)â†’TRAINING COMPLETEâ†’BEGIN BATTLEâ†’BATTLE_LOOP. SKIP button works. SOLO mode bypasses tutorial. HP bars show 10 segments, green/yellow/red colors, shake on damage, health number '9 / 10'. Result display shows VICTORY/DEFEAT/STALEMATE with move labels and VS separator.
verified_features: Mode select shows 4 options: TUTORIAL, SOLO, PASS & PLAY, ONLINE DUEL
Clicking TUTORIAL mode goes through oracle select â†’ calibration â†’ Tutorial screen (not directly to battle)
Tutorial screen shows RPS triangle diagram with BURST, FLOW, TONE nodes and 'BEATS' arrows
Tutorial has 'PRACTICE SOUNDS' button that advances to phoneme practice steps
Each phoneme practice step shows instruction, example sounds, and 'TAP & SPEAK' button
After practicing all 3 phonemes, 'TRAINING COMPLETE' + 'BEGIN BATTLE' button appears
Clicking 'BEGIN BATTLE' transitions to BATTLE_LOOP state
Tutorial has 'SKIP' button in top-right that goes directly to battle
Clicking SOLO mode (not tutorial) goes directly to battle after calibration (no tutorial screen)
HP bars are large, segmented (10 segments), and show health number below (e.g. '9 / 10')
HP bars visually decrease when damage is taken (segment becomes empty)
HP bars change color: green > 50%, yellow 25-50%, red < 25%
Result display shows VICTORY/DEFEAT/STALEMATE with move labels and 'VS' separator
Battle listen window is 6 seconds (LISTEN_WINDOW_MS = 6000 confirmed in code)
Result display stays for 5 seconds before next round (RESULT_DISPLAY after 5000ms confirmed)
Full 10-round game completes to END_GAME with final score
No JavaScript errors in browser console during any flow (except expected mic NotFoundError)

test_details.tutorial_flow_timing: Boot clickâ†’2sâ†’mode-tutorialâ†’9s rulesâ†’oracle clickâ†’5s confirmingâ†’30s calibrationâ†’tutorial screenâ†’practice soundsâ†’burst(3s+0.8s)â†’flow(3s+0.8s)â†’tone(3s+0.8s)â†’ready screenâ†’begin battleâ†’BATTLE_LOOP
test_details.battle_timing_per_round: 6s speech fallback + 6s listen + 5s result = ~17s per round
